items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) is a Top-Ranked Growth Stock: Should You Buy?
items.snippet: For fiscal 2026, five analysts revised earnings estimates upward in the last 60 days; Zacks Consensus Estimate increased $2.69 to $13.06/share. ALB boasts average earnings surprise of +74.5%.

items.headline: Bull of the Day: Albemarle (ALB)
items.snippet: Zack Rank #1 (Strong Buy). Q1 EPS of $2.95 crushed consensus of $1.24 by 138%. Revenue of $1.43B topped $1.33B estimate. Adjusted EBITDA hit $664M, up from $267.1M a year ago. Energy Storage Systems GWh production jumped 117% YoY.

items.headline: UBS Adjusts Price Target on Albemarle to $205 From $264
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) has an average rating of overweight and mean price target of $211.44, according to analysts polled by FactSet.

items.headline: The U.S. Is Increasing Efforts to Rebuild Its Rare Earth Supply Chain
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation (NYSE: ALB) is the world's largest lithium producer. Q1 2026 adjusted EBITDA jumped 148% YoY to $664 million as lithium prices rebounded from 2025 lows. Albemarle used the recovery to cut debt, retiring $1.3 billion of obligations during the quarter.

items.headline: Lithium Is on the Rise Again. Does That Make Albemarle a Buy?
items.snippet: Albemarle slashed capex by 46% YoY in Q1, idled Kemerton Train 1 in February, divested Ketjen catalyst division in March. Q1 sales of $1.4B, up 33% YoY. Adjusted EBITDA $664M, up 148% YoY.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) is likely to continue growing volumes over the coming years from mostly brownfield at Wodgina, Atacama productivity, and opportunities at its Kings Mountain and Antofalla hubs, RBC Capital Markets said. Lithium supply is expected to remain tight through 2027. RBC
